style_authority.note: Separates shared semantic roles and content hierarchy from platform-native navigation, controls, icons, materials, and motion.

reference_selection.note: Applies product context, iOS, Android, adaptive layout, accessibility, interaction, motion, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust and task flow without proposing identical mockups, decorative cards, glass, gradients, or marketing treatment.

evidence_level.note: Labels the input prompt-attested static description and explicitly denies source, build, simulator, emulator, device, and performance proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates described implementation violations from unknown source details, target geometry, accessibility trees, adaptivity, gestures, and runtime results.

design_moves.note: Gives platform navigation, size-class layouts, targets, scalable type, semantic theming, native controls, motion accessibility, and a parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stays within 150 lines and native-product scope, with a small amount of extra persistence/state-machine implementation detail.
